title: Slovakia — Trade Notification / Application for a Trade Authorization Certificate for a Natural Person (Ohlásenie živnosti fyzickou osobou)
description:
The Slovak Republic's standard "Formulár pre fyzickú osobu — ohlásenie voľnej, remeselnej alebo viazanej živnosti / žiadosť o vydanie osvedčenia o živnostenskom oprávnení" (Form for a natural person — trade notification, for a free/craft/licensed trade, or application for issuance of a certificate of trade authorization), official form code T MV SR 2007/60, filed at an Okresný úrad's (District Office) department of trade licensing (odbor živnostenského podnikania) under §45, §45a, and §46 of Act No. 455/1991 Zb. on Trade Licensing (živnostenský zákon), as amended. Opens Slovakia's Business Formation vertical (1 of 6, alongside the registry's existing sk/financna-sprava Taxes schema opened the same cycle).

This single, seven-page government form bundles three legally distinct filings, reflecting Slovakia's "jednotné kontaktné miesto" (single contact point) principle for new sole traders: Part A (A.1 the applicant's identity/address/business data, A.2 the additional data required of a foreign natural person or a foreign enterprise's branch, and A.3 professional-competence/premises-use evidence and the closing declaration), Part B (up to four declared business activities, the form's own printed capacity, each with its own start/end date, responsible-representative flag, and premises), Part B.1 (the responsible representative's own consent and declaration, when Part B designates one), Part C (criminal-record-extract request data for up to four persons subject to the good-standing/bezúhonnosť requirement — again the form's own printed capacity), Part D (mandatory public health-insurance registration), and Part E (tax-registration data for income tax on the natural person). Models all 192 `fields[]` this printed structure exposes, plus 8 `documents[]` entries (fee payment, professional-competence and premises-use evidence, and four separate signature/declaration attestations across Parts A.3, B.1, D, and E), 4 `crossFieldValidation` rules (each business activity's end date not preceding its own start date), and 1 `exclusivityGroup` (Part D's resident vs. non-resident-self-employed insured-person designation).

Scope decisions disclosed in full in VERIFICATION.md: (1) several footnoted OR-requirements the shared Condition grammar cannot cleanly express without a field-absence leaf operator — e.g. birth place/date required only when a personal number is not given, or a domestic representative required only for an applicant permanently resident abroad — are documented in the affected fields' own `description` rather than encoded as `requiredWhen`, consistent with this registry's established caution around gating requiredness on an optional field's absence; (2) Parts D and E each print a small "cross-link" block (surname/given name/personal number) whose own text states its purpose is solely to tie a physically separated page back to Part A, not to collect new data — these are not re-modelled as duplicate fields; (3) Part B.1 models exactly one responsible representative, matching the form's own single-block capacity, gated with `requiredWhen` on any of the four Part B activity blocks' responsible-representative flag. This document is authored at `structural-reference` maturity: the form's own printed structure is fully transcribed and machine-checkable rules are encoded where the Condition grammar permits, but no live filing at an Okresný úrad was attempted. GovSchema is an independent, non-profit standards body and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of the Slovak Republic, the Ministry of Interior of the Slovak Republic, or any Okresný úrad.

authority.name: Okresný úrad, odbor živnostenského podnikania (District Office, Department of Trade Licensing)

operatedBy.name: Ministerstvo vnútra Slovenskej republiky (Ministry of Interior of the Slovak Republic)
operatedBy.basis: Okresné úrady (District Offices), whose departments of trade licensing administer this filing under §3a of Act No. 455/1991 Zb. on Trade Licensing (živnostenský zákon), are territorial units of state administration operating under the Ministry of Interior of the Slovak Republic per Act No. 180/2013 Z.z. on the Organisation of Local State Administration, §2-§3; the form's own printed code, 'T MV SR 2007/60', likewise attributes it to the Ministry of Interior.

verification.notes: GovSchema Standard Research cycle GOV-2995, deepening Slovakia (opened this same day via GOV-2981's Taxes schema) with its Business Formation vertical (1 of 6). Independently re-fetched this cycle directly from slovensko.sk (HTTP 200, application/pdf, 531,643 bytes, sha256 a78451f134a72785e3e0553b36d1c207be68af8104f88c4fcb157341360fe286), matching the scouting subagent's own figures exactly, and independently re-extracted the full 7-page text from scratch via pdfjs-dist getTextContent() (not trusted from the scouting report as-is) plus confirmed getFieldObjects() returns null (a genuine flat print-and-hand-fill specimen, no AcroForm). See VERIFICATION.md for the full sourcing record, the per-part field tally, and every disclosed scoping/judgment-call decision.

fields.name: isNonEuOecdCertificateRequest
fields.label: Žiadosť o vydanie osvedčenia o živnostenskom oprávnení (in place of an ohlásenie)
fields.description: True when this filing is the 'application for a trade-authorization certificate' variant rather than an ordinary 'trade notification' (ohlásenie). Per the form's own footnote 1, this variant is filed by an existing foreign natural person who has no permanent residence in an EU or OECD member state; for such a filer, trade authorization does not arise from the notification itself but only on the date recorded in the Commercial Register.
fields.sourceRef: Page 1 header, form title and footnote 1

fields.name: applicantPersonalNumber
fields.label: Rodné číslo
fields.description: Slovak birth/personal identification number. The form's own note ties applicantBirthPlace/applicantBirthDate's requirement to this field being absent; see this schema's VERIFICATION.md for why that OR-requirement is disclosed rather than machine-enforced.

fields.name: applicantBirthPlace
fields.label: Miesto narodenia
fields.description: Required when applicantPersonalNumber is not provided (form's own parenthetical note, '(ak nie je uvedené rodné číslo)'); not machine-enforced, see VERIFICATION.md.

fields.name: applicantBirthDate
fields.label: Dátum narodenia
fields.description: Required when applicantPersonalNumber is not provided (form's own parenthetical note); not machine-enforced, see VERIFICATION.md.
fields.sourceRef: Part A.1, 'dátum narodenia: (ak nie je uvedené rodné číslo)'

fields.name: applicantResidencePermitUntil
fields.label: Pobyt na území SR do
fields.description: Date until which a foreign applicant's residence permit in the Slovak Republic is valid; relevant only to foreign nationals with time-limited residence.
fields.sourceRef: Part A.1, 'pobyt na území SR do:'

fields.name: residenceStreet
fields.label: Bydlisko — ulica
fields.description: A foreign applicant states their residence outside the Slovak Republic here per the form's own instruction ('zahraničná osoba uvedie bydlisko mimo územia SR').

fields.name: existingBusinessId
fields.label: Identifikačné číslo (IČO, ak bolo pridelené)
fields.description: Business identification number, if one was already assigned to the applicant from a prior registration.
fields.sourceRef: Part A.1, 'identifikačné číslo (IČO, ak bolo pridelené):'

fields.name: mailingStreet
fields.label: Adresa pre doručovanie — ulica
fields.description: Given only when the mailing address differs from the place of business, per the form's own instruction.

fields.name: foreignEnterpriseName
fields.label: Označenie — podnik zahraničnej osoby
fields.description: Distinguishing designation for the foreign person's enterprise in the Slovak Republic, given if different from the foreign person's own business name (form footnote 2).
fields.sourceRef: Part A.2, OZNAČENIE podniku zahraničnej osoby..., 'podnik zahraničnej osoby'

fields.name: foreignEnterpriseBranchName
fields.label: Označenie — organizačná zložka podniku zahraničnej osoby
fields.description: Distinguishing designation for the foreign person's organizational unit/branch in the Slovak Republic, given if different from the foreign person's own business name (form footnote 2).
fields.sourceRef: Part A.2, OZNAČENIE podniku zahraničnej osoby..., 'organizačná zložka podniku zahraničnej osoby'

fields.name: activityAddressStreet
fields.label: Adresa miesta činnosti — ulica
fields.description: Part A.2 (this address block included) applies only to a foreign natural person or a foreign enterprise's branch; within that scope the form marks this its own 'povinný údaj' (mandatory field), not machine-enforced here since Part A.2's own applicability is not itself a modelled field.
fields.sourceRef: Part A.2, Adresa miesta činnosti..., 'ulica:' (povinný údaj)

fields.name: activityAddressHouseNumber
fields.label: Adresa miesta činnosti — číslo
fields.description: See activityAddressStreet: mandatory only within Part A.2's own foreign-person/branch scope.
fields.sourceRef: Part A.2, Adresa miesta činnosti..., 'číslo:' (povinný údaj)

fields.name: activityAddressMunicipality
fields.label: Adresa miesta činnosti — obec
fields.description: See activityAddressStreet: mandatory only within Part A.2's own foreign-person/branch scope.
fields.sourceRef: Part A.2, Adresa miesta činnosti..., 'obec:' (povinný údaj)

fields.label: Spoločne s ohlásením žiadam o prvý zápis do obchodného registra
fields.description: True when the applicant, together with this trade notification, also submits the data and documents (including court fees) for a proposal for first entry in the Commercial Register.
fields.sourceRef: Part A.3, 'Spoločne s ohlásením živnosti uvádzam údaje a prikladám doklady, vrátane súdnych poplatkov na účely návrhu na prvý zápis do obchodného registra.'

fields.name: administrativeFeeAmount
fields.label: Doklad o zaplatení správneho poplatku v hodnote
fields.description: Amount of the administrative fee paid, as written by the applicant into the form's own blank ('v hodnote ______'); the form does not print a fixed fee amount.
fields.sourceRef: Part A.3, Príloha, 'Doklad o zaplatení správneho poplatku v hodnote ______'

fields.label: Priezvisko
fields.description: Surname of the person for whom a criminal-record extract is requested. Part C is completed only for a person with Slovak state nationality in the role of applicant, responsible representative, manager of a foreign enterprise/branch, or statutory-body member (form's own note on who is subject to the good-standing/bezúhonnosť condition) — not machine-enforced here since that nationality/role gate is not itself a modelled field.

fields.description: Option (a): a person with permanent residence in the Slovak Republic who is mandatorily publicly health-insured.

fields.name: domesticBankName
fields.label: Tuzemský účet — názov peňažného ústavu
fields.sourceRef: Part E, Čísla účtov a) tuzemské, 'názov peňažného ústavu'

fields.name: domesticBankAccountIban
fields.label: Tuzemský účet — číslo účtu vo formáte IBAN
fields.description: 24-character alphanumeric IBAN, printed in six four-character groups on the paper form (form footnote 2 on this page).
fields.sourceRef: Part E, Čísla účtov a) tuzemské, 'číslo účtu vo formáte IBAN'

fields.name: foreignBankAccountIban
fields.label: Zahraničný účet — číslo účtu v IBAN
fields.sourceRef: Part E, Čísla účtov b) v zahraničí, 'číslo účtu v IBAN'

fields.name: foreignBankSwiftCode
fields.label: Zahraničný účet — SWIFT kód banky
fields.sourceRef: Part E, Čísla účtov b) v zahraničí, 'SWIFT kód banky'

fields.name: otherOrganizationalUnitAddress
fields.label: Iné organizačné jednotky ako prevádzkarne — adresa
fields.description: Address (street, number, postal code, municipality) of another organizational unit that is not itself a business premises (prevádzkareň).
fields.sourceRef: Part E, 'Iné organizačné jednotky ako prevádzkarne (adresa, ulica, číslo, PSČ, obec, označenie*)'

fields.name: otherOrganizationalUnitType
fields.label: Iné organizačné jednotky ako prevádzkarne — označenie
fields.description: O = odštepný závod (branch plant), B = obchodné zastúpenie (commercial representation), K = kancelária (office) — the form's own three-letter designation key (footnote *).
fields.sourceRef: Part E, footnote '* označenie: O = odštepný závod, B = obchodné zastúpenie, K = kancelária'

documents.label: Doklad o zaplatení správneho poplatku
documents.sourceRef: Part A.3, Príloha — Proof of payment of the administrative fee, attached per the form's own 'Príloha' line.

documents.label: Doklady preukazujúce odbornú spôsobilosť
documents.sourceRef: Part A.3, 'Odbornú spôsobilosť preukazujem nasledovnými dokladmi:' — Free-form list, written in by the applicant, of the documents used to prove professional competence for the declared trade activities.

documents.label: Doklad o oprávnení užívať nehnuteľnosť
documents.sourceRef: Part A.3, 'Oprávnenie užívať nehnuteľnosť ... preukazujem:' — Free-form list, written in by the applicant, of the documents proving the right to use the premises named as the place of business (or of the foreign enterprise's/branch's place of activity).

documents.label: Vyhlásenie žiadateľa
documents.statement: Vyhlasujem, že uvedené údaje sú pravdivé, že žiadny osobitný zákon mi neobmedzuje alebo nevylučuje prevádzkovať živnosť, a že na môj majetok nebol ukončený konkurz a ani nebol návrh na konkurz zamietnutý pre nedostatok majetku, že mi súdom ani správnym orgánom nebol uložený zákaz činnosti týkajúci sa vykonávania živnosti.

documents.label: Podpis fyzickej osoby
documents.sourceRef: Part A.3, closing block, 'podpis fyzickej osoby'

documents.label: Súhlas a vyhlásenie zodpovedného zástupcu
documents.statement: SÚHLASÍM s ustanovením do funkcie zodpovedného zástupcu v zmysle § 11 zákona č. 455/1991 Zb. o živnostenskom podnikaní (živnostenský zákon) v znení neskorších predpisov, u fyzickej osoby uvedenej v časti A tohto formulára a VYHLASUJEM že uvedené údaje sú pravdivé a že nebolo mi zrušené živnostenské oprávnenie za porušenie podmienok alebo povinností určených zákonom ako osobitne závažné, ani za porušenie podmienok živnostenským zákonom alebo iným právnym predpisom, mi nebol súdom ani správnym orgánom uložený zákaz činnosti týkajúci sa vykonávania živnosti.
